case cubic_bezier
kind cubic
p a0 0.0	0.0	0.0
p h0 1.0	2.0	0.0
p h1 3.0	2.0	0.0
p a1 4.0	0.0	0.0
p midpoint 2.0	1.5	0.0
note endpoints_only
points 2
0.0	0.0	0.0

end
